mcp.clientConfigNote: Replace cwd with your local repository path before pasting this into an MCP client that supports mcpServers JSON.

tools.name: search_web3_content
tools.title: Search Web3 Course Content
tools.description: Search lesson titles, headings, excerpts, and glossary definitions.

tools.name: read_web3_lesson
tools.title: Read Web3 Lesson
tools.description: Read a full lesson by language and lesson identifier.

tools.name: get_learning_path
tools.title: Get Learning Path
tools.description: Return role-based learning paths for beginners, builders, researchers, and investors.

tools.name: lookup_web3_glossary
tools.title: Lookup Web3 Glossary
tools.description: Search concise glossary entries for Web3 concepts.

tools.name: compose_web3_context
tools.title: Compose Web3 Context
tools.description: Build a bounded context pack with citations for a topic.

tools.name: list_monetizable_tools
tools.title: List Monetizable Tools
tools.description: List future x402-ready paid tool metadata. Local MCP does not enforce payment.

tools.name: generate_personalized_web3_plan
tools.title: Generate Personalized Web3 Plan
tools.description: Future paid remote tool that turns learner goals and background into a tailored Web3 study plan.

tools.name: audit_learning_answer
tools.title: Audit Learning Answer
tools.description: Future paid remote tool that reviews a learner answer against repository lessons with cited corrections.
